tom.bio: Fullstack developer focused on TypeScript, React, and backend integration. Beyond education, I have practical experience in setting up Linux environments and integrating real-time data into personal projects.
tom.aboutText: I am seeking an internship (LIA v.35–48) in a team that values technical accuracy and modern development workflows. My focus is on building type-safe and scalable applications.
